title: KidBloom Kids Tool Set, 50 Pcs Kids Tool Box with Toy Drill & Tool Belt, Toys for 3 4 5 Year Old Boys Gifts
features: Realistic Construction Fun: These construction toys include a toy drill with sound & rotating function, letting kids simulate real building tasks; while playing, kids strengthen fine motor skills and gain confidence by imitating their dad at work

Adjustable Tool Belt: This kids tool belt fits various waist sizes (19.69–39.37 in) thanks to its stretchable, reinforced design; with 2 pockets & slots for kids tools, it's a fun pick among toys for 3 4 5 year old boy who love pretend play

My Own Toolbox Like Dad's: This kids tool box is more than storage – it gives kids the feeling of having their very own set of tools, just like real craftsmen; it sparks imagination, builds responsibility, and lets kids experience the pride of working like dad

Creative Fun with Kids Tool Set: Includes 50 pcs like screws, nails & a mini stool to build & take apart; kids build fun structures while spending quality time with parents, boosting creativity, logic, and emotional bond
Safe Design for Little Hands: These kids toys are made of durable ABS, break-proof & with rounded edges – no sharp parts, safe for independent play

Special Gift with Learning Value: This kids tool kit is perfect for 3 4 5 year old boy gifts, whether from parents or grandparents; great for christmas or birthdays, it helps kids learn tool names, functions & safe use while developing skills & basic safety awareness

specifications_table.Educational Objective(s): ‎Communication Skill, Creative Thinking, Hand-Eye Coordination, Imagination Development, Logical Thinking, Problem Solving Skill, Role Play
